LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER TIMOTHY MCCANN'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. THE EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF THE DMV DECISION IS OVERWHELMING. THE OFFICERS' REPORTS ARE ADMISSIBLE UNDER EVIDENCE CODE 1280 AND ANY DISCREPANCIES ARE IMMATERIAL. COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY THE OTHER SIDE OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR THERFORE THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR ARGUMENT ON THE MATTER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600
